# `request_id`

Ensures every request carries a correlation ID.

## Configuration

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `header_name` | string | no | Name of the header to read, generate, and forward. |

## Example

```yaml
filter: request_id
header_name: X-Correlation-ID   # optional
```
